name: hello-csv
goal: Create a CSV file at greeting.csv with header row 'id,message' followed by exactly one data row with id=1 and message='Hello from UAS'.

notes.purpose: Tier 0 smoke test for CSV file production. Exercises file_shape (csv format + required_columns + row-count bounds). The min_rows == max_rows == 1 constraint catches the common LLM tendency to add example rows beyond the spec.
